acceptance_criteria.text: Agent Blueprint UI exposes sourcing filters, prospectingleads provenance, queued_not_dispatched state, and approval queue context with guardrails.
proof: Artifact cards render prospectingleads source, source_artifact lineage, and filters.
Approval queue cards render artifact type and item count.
lint_backend_baseline checks UI markers; audit_approval_boundaries checks smoke cleanup/no-dispatch contract.
gaps: Authenticated browser UI smoke was not completed because local /dashboard/agents redirected to login.

known_gaps: Authenticated visual UI smoke remains a follow-up.
